name: Seertech Corporation
summary: As of May 1, 2008, Seertech Corporation went out of business. The company is a holding company, which through its subsidiaries develops technologies and manufacturing processes to produce electronic products for the display, signage, and power industries. It offers FASwitch, a proprietary flexible array switch technology for applications, such as large-area displays and signs. Seertech Corporation was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
